About Us

Coindoor is one of the best Artificial intelligence trading platforms for Traders. Its programed with Thousands of Indicator's, Candlestick patterns, Screeners, including 15 year historical trading data analysis, and experienced traders participate in the program, covering various strategies.

This includes everything from day trading and long-term investing to high-frequency trading. Coindoor offers Auto Buy Sell & zero loss guarantee

More Info

Why Choose Coindoor

Our goal is to provide our Trades with a reliable source of high income, while minimizing any possible risks and offering a high-quality service.

Forex Ai Trading

Our company conducts Ai based forex trading. We are certified to operate Forex business, we are secure and safe.

Zero loss Guarantee

You will never get any loss in trading with us. We are trusted by a huge number of people. We are working hard constantly to improve our Ai.

Up to 10% daily Profit

Anonymity and using cryptocurrency as a payment instrument. In the era of electronic money – this is one of the most convenient ways of cooperation.

Quick Withdrawal

Our all retreats are treated spontaneously once requested. There are high maximum limits. The minimum withdrawal amount is only $10 .

Referral Program

We are offering a 5 level of referral income through our referral program. you can increase your income by simply refer a few people.

24/7 Support

We provide 24/7 customer support through e-mail and telegram. Our support representatives are periodically available to elucidate any difficulty.

Dedicated Server

We are using a dedicated server for the website which allows us exclusive use of the resources of the entire server.

SSL Secured

Comodo Essential-SSL Security encryption confirms that the presented content is genuine and legitimate.

DDOS Protection

We are using one of the most experienced, professional, and trusted DDoS Protection and mitigation provider.

Profit Calculator

You must know the calculation before deposit, so you never make mistakes. Check the calculation and you will get as our calculator says. Profit depend on Market volatility
